Record id: ode_symplectic.leapfrog_orbit_step_invariant_1d

def leapfrogStep (omega dt x xPrev : ℝ) : ℝ := 2 * x - xPrev - dt ^ 2 * omega ^ 2 * x

def symplecticEulerInvariant (omega dt q p : ℝ) : ℝ := p ^ 2 + omega ^ 2 * q ^ 2 - dt * omega ^ 2 * q * p
def IsSymplecticEulerOrbit (omega dt : ℝ) (q p : ℕ → ℝ) : Prop := ∀ n : ℕ, p (n + 1) = symplecticEulerPNext omega dt (q n) (p n) ∧ q (n + 1) = symplecticEulerQNext omega dt (q n) (p n)

  (omega dt q p : ℝ) :
  symplecticEulerInvariant omega dt
  (symplecticEulerQNext omega dt q p)

def heatBoundaryTerm (u : Nat -> Real) (n : Nat) : Real := u 0 - u 1 + (u (n + 1) - u n)

def weightedP0Average {ι : Type} (s : Finset ι) (m u : ι → Real) : Real := (∑ i ∈ s, m i * u i) / (∑ i ∈ s, m i)
